title: Phase B SFT Training Entry
description: One RAFT training sample: question + context + cited answer (RAFT Phase B)

global_idx.description: Global question index (0-2231), stable across sessions

context_ids.description: IDs of context passages (oracle + distractors for oracle mode, distractors only for abstain, empty for memorize)

answer.description: Generated answer (markers stripped) or abstain template

quote.description: Extracted verbatim quote from answer, or null

quote_valid.description: true if quote is substring of oracle chunk text

quote_method.description: How quote was extracted: RAFT markers, regex fallback, or not found

generation_time_s.description: Wall time for this entry in seconds
